title: Valorant Origins (deprecated)
description: Introduces Valorant agents as new origins while keeping it survival friendly.
body:
**Valorant Origins** is a mod that introduces your favorite Valorant agents into Minecraft as new origins.

- **While not** all agents are included, this is because Valorant is primarily a shooter game, and some agents' abilities wouldn't translate effectively to survival Minecraft.

don't expect to see the exact same abilities seen on valorant as i tried to make this survival friendly and some abilities won't be useful in survival.

This addon goes greatly with boss fight mods like:

L_Ender 's Cataclysm

Mowzie's Mobs

**The currently avaiable agents**:
- Jett
- Omen
- Sova
- Phoenix
- Harbor
- Skye (added in 1.1.0)
- Neon (added in 1.2.0)
- Breach (added in 1.2.0)
- Sage (added in 1.3.0)
- Iso (added in 1.4.0)

and more to come..

feel free to use this mod in your modpack.

if you have any suggestions please let me know.
